summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Products page marketplace logos feature. All SVG logos successfully replaced text names in filter dropdown, product table badges, skeleton section, and filter button. Amazon shows orange-tinted badges, Flipkart shows blue-tinted badges, Meesho shows pink, Wish shows cyan. All filtering, search, and product actions work correctly.
passed_tests: Products page loads correctly at /products with marketplace logos
Amazon products display orange SVG wordmark logo in orange-tinted badges
Flipkart products display blue SVG logo with F icon in blue-tinted badges
Marketplace filter dropdown shows SVG logos for all marketplaces instead of text
Filter dropdown displays sync statuses (Synced/Syncing/Pending) next to logos
Amazon filter correctly filters to Amazon-only products with logos showing
Flipkart filter correctly filters to Flipkart-only products with logos showing
Skeleton section shows 'Products from [logo] will appear here once sync completes' for Meesho and Wish
Filter button displays marketplace logo when specific marketplace is selected
Product search functionality works correctly with logo implementation
Sync banner and progress bar remain visible and functional
Dynamic sync completion works with toast notifications for Meesho and Wish
Non-synced marketplace filters are properly disabled until sync completes
Meesho logo displays in pink color, Wish logo displays in cyan color
